---
title: "The Rev. Thomas Mozley"
---

## The Rev. Thomas Mozley

**Dates:** (1806-1893)

### Description

brother of John and Charles Mozley

### Biography

he married (1836) Harriett Newman (1803-1852) and secondly (1861) Elizabeth Bradshaw. [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from December 10, 1896.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
